title: Taiwan Daily Insider - 2026-04-11
summary: Hello and welcome to Taiwan Daily Insider, your essential daily briefing for foreign professionals, expats, and Gold Card holders navigating the dynamic landscape of Taiwan. Im your host, and today is Saturday, April 11, 2026.Weve got a packed agenda for you today, diving deep into Taiwans economic powerhouses, significant foreign investment trends, and the latest geopolitical shifts that impact our lives here. Plus, well wrap up with a look at whats buzzing on Taiwans social media.Lets kick things off with some major economic news thats directly impacting your wallet and the broader market.
